responseMessageContents.text: The `rork-testing-app` repository isn't accessible—it's either private or doesn't exist publicly. I can only work with the three public repos that are available, and the full application is already here in this workspace along with `rork-global-real-estate-invest`, so nothing's been lost.

Honest answer, verified live on GitHub just now:

## `rork-testing-app` — still cannot be accessed

- `gh repo clone ibb142/rork-testing-app` → **404 Not Found**, checked directly against GitHub's API a moment ago. It either **doesn't exist** or is **private**, so I cannot review its functionality, compare it to your app, or sync anything from it. There is literally no code visible to pull.

- I also listed **every public repo** on your account (`ibb142`) again to be sure:

```text
1. IPX-Luxury-holdings-             created Jan 21, 2026
2. IPX-Holding-10                   created Jan 25, 2026
3. rork-global-real-estate-invest   created Mar 1, 2026 — last push Jul 9, 2026
```

No `rork-testing-app` anywhere in that list.

## Did you lose anything? No.

Nothing is lost. Your full app is **right here in this workspace**, intact and measured live in our earlier audits:

- **Backend**: 111 API modules + 273 services, deployed at api.ivxholding.com
- **App**: 254 screens in `expo/`
- **Landing page**: live at ivxholding.com
- All synced with `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (last push July 9, 2026)

## How to unblock me

If `rork-testing-app` is a **private** repo you own, do one of these and I'll compare + sync immediately:

1. Open it on GitHub → Settings → change visibility to **Public** (you can flip it back after), then tell me "check again".
2. Or tell me what's inside it, and I'll tell you whether it overlaps with what's already here.

Until it's visible, there's genuinely nothing to review or sync — and syncing an empty/invisible repo over your working app would be the only way to actually lose something, which I won't do.
